Default Application Form

or drag and drop here

or drag and drop here

We’re interested in how you think about product problems and how you influence direction. In a few sentences, describe:

The situation and what was initially being asked
What you believed was wrong or missing in the problem framing
What you did to challenge or reframe it
What changed as a result
No need for a detailed case study - a concise, high-level example is perfect.
